records.question: Which customers have the address line 59 rue de l'Abbaye, have the contact last name Henriot, are associated with employees through their sales representative employee number, and have related payments records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customernumber FROM customers
JOIN employees ON customers.salesrepemployeenumber = employees.employeenumber
JOIN payments ON customers.customernumber = payments.customernumber
WHERE customers.addressline1 = '59 rue de l''Abbaye' AND customers.contactlastname = 'Henriot'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT customers.customerNumber
FROM customers
JOIN employees ON customers.salesRepEmployeeNumber = employees.employeeNumber
JOIN payments ON customers.customerNumber = payments.customerNumber
WHERE customers.addressLine1 = '59 rue de l''Abbaye'
  AND customers.contactLastName = 'Henriot'

records.question: What customers have the address Arenales 1938 3'A', with the contact name Tony Snowden and a credit limit exactly 110000.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customernumber FROM customers
WHERE customers.addressline1 = 'Arenales 1938 3''A''' AND customers.contactlastname = 'Snowden' AND customers.contactfirstname = 'Tony' AND customers.creditlimit = 110000.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customerNumber
FROM customers
WHERE addressLine1 = "Arenales 1938 3'A'"
  AND contactFirstName = 'Tony'
  AND contactLastName = 'Snowden'
  AND creditLimit = 110000.0

records.question: Which customers have the contact first name Mel and an address exactly at Obere Str. 57?

SELECT customers.customernumber FROM customers

records.pred_sql:

FROM customers
WHERE contactFirstName = 'Mel' AND addressLine1 = 'Obere Str. 57'

records.question: Which customers have the customer name exactly 'Diecast Classics Inc.', have a sales representative employee whose first name is exactly 'Steve', have a city exactly 'Allentown', have a contact first name exactly 'Kelvin', have a postal code exactly '70267', and also have related payments records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customernumber FROM customers
JOIN employees ON customers.salesrepemployeenumber = employees.employeenumber
JOIN payments ON customers.customernumber = payments.customernumber
WHERE customers.customername = 'Diecast Classics Inc.' AND employees.firstname = 'Steve' AND customers.city = 'Allentown' AND customers.contactfirstname = 'Kelvin' AND customers.postalcode = '70267'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customerNumber
FROM customers
JOIN employees ON customers.salesRepEmployeeNumber = employees.employeeNumber
JOIN payments ON customers.customerNumber = payments.customerNumber
WHERE customers.customerName = 'Diecast Classics Inc.'
  AND employees.firstName = 'Steve'
  AND customers.city = 'Allentown'
  AND customers.contactFirstName = 'Kelvin'
  AND customers.postalCode = '70267'

records.question: Which customers located in the city of Madrid with the contact last name 'Freyre', phone number '(91) 555 94 44', customer name 'Euro+ Shopping Channel', address line 1 'C/ Moralzarzal, 86', and postal code '28034' have recorded orders dated exactly '2005-05-13' and also have associated payments?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customernumber FROM customers
JOIN orders ON customers.customernumber = orders.customernumber
JOIN payments ON customers.customernumber = payments.customernumber
WHERE customers.city = 'Madrid' AND customers.contactlastname = 'Freyre' AND customers.phone = '(91) 555 94 44' AND customers.customername = 'Euro+ Shopping Channel' AND customers.addressline1 = 'C/ Moralzarzal, 86' AND customers.postalcode = '28034' AND orders.orderdate = '2005-05-13'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customerNumber
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerNumber = o.customerNumber
JOIN payments p ON c.customerNumber = p.customerNumber
WHERE c.city = 'Madrid'
  AND c.contactLastName = 'Freyre'
  AND c.phone = '(91) 555 94 44'
  AND c.customerName = 'Euro+ Shopping Channel'
  AND c.addressLine1 = 'C/ Moralzarzal, 86'
  AND c.postalCode = '28034'
  AND o.orderDate = '2005-05-13'

records.question: Who are the customers named Rovelli Gifts with contact last name Rovelli living at Via Ludovico il Moro 22 in Bergamo, Italy, having postal code 24100, phone 035-640555, and a credit limit of 119600.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customernumber FROM customers

FROM customers
WHERE customerName = 'Rovelli Gifts'

  AND city = 'Bergamo'
  AND country = 'Italy'

  AND phone = '035-640555'
  AND creditLimit = 119600.0

records.question: Which customers have a credit limit of 43400.0 and are served by employees whose jobtitle is Sales Rep?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customernumber FROM customers
JOIN employees ON customers.salesrepemployeenumber = employees.employeenumber
JOIN offices ON employees.officecode = offices.officecode
WHERE customers.creditlimit = 43400.0 AND employees.jobtitle = 'Sales Rep'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customerNumber
FROM customers
JOIN employees ON customers.salesRepEmployeeNumber = employees.employeeNumber
WHERE customers.creditLimit = 43400.0
  AND employees.jobTitle = 'Sales Rep'

records.question: Which customers named Down Under Souveniers, Inc with contact last name Graham are located at 162-164 Grafton Road, Level 2 in New Zealand and have a sales rep whose last name is Marsh, job title is Sales Rep, and extension is x102?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customernumber FROM customers
JOIN employees ON customers.salesrepemployeenumber = employees.employeenumber
WHERE employees.lastname = 'Marsh' AND customers.contactlastname = 'Graham' AND customers.customername = 'Down Under Souveniers, Inc' AND customers.addressline2 = 'Level 2' AND customers.country = 'New Zealand' AND customers.addressline1 = '162-164 Grafton Road' AND employees.jobtitle = 'Sales Rep' AND employees.extension = 'x102'

SELECT customers.customerNumber
FROM customers
JOIN employees ON customers.salesRepEmployeeNumber = employees.employeeNumber
WHERE customers.customerName = 'Down Under Souveniers, Inc'
  AND customers.contactLastName = 'Graham'
  AND customers.addressLine1 = '162-164 Grafton Road, Level 2'
  AND customers.country = 'New Zealand'
  AND employees.lastName = 'Marsh'
  AND employees.jobTitle = 'Sales Rep'
  AND employees.extension = 'x102'
